response.original_title: Milk & Cookies A Video Snack for Kids of All Ages
response.overview: A fascinating behind-the-scenes look at the making of children's favorite treat.  Two real-life kids research a Show and Tell for their class, gathering first-hand information at a farm, a dairy, and a bakery—where they discover a cookie oven as long as a football field! Lively music and mouth-watering closeups complement the tours they lead.
response.tagline: Milk & Cookies A Video Snack for Kids of All Ages
response.title: Milk & Cookies A Video Snack for Kids of All Ages
